y=function(y,L,I,Q,u,W,U,w)return G(B,{y;L,I;Q;u,W,U,w},F,r)end return y end,{},{},function(B,F)local r=R(F)local y=function(y,L,I,Q)return G(B,{y,L,I;Q},F,r)end return y end,function(B,F)local r=R(F)local y=function(y,L,I,Q,u,W)return G(B,{y,L;I;Q;u,W},F,r)end return y end,function(B,F)local r=R(F)local y=function(y,L)return G(B,{y,L},F,r)end return y end,function(B,F)local r=R(F)local
